title: Ubiquiti UP-AI-Port, UniFi Protect AI Port
description: The AI device enhances the functionality of any UniFi Protect camera or third-party camera with AI-powered detection, classification, and recognition capabilities. The device can be mounted on a wall or a pipe with a diameter of at least 45mm Each AI-Port supports exactly one third-party camera or a UniFi Protect G3/G4/G5 camera. Future firmware updates will enable support for multiple cameras. The camera does not need to be directly connected to the AI-Port; it only needs to be on the same LAN and paired with the AI-Port via the Protect application The AI-Port can be powered via an 802.3af/at/bt PoE input. With 802.3at input power, the PoE output provides up to 12.95W, and with 802.3bt input power, the output provides up to 25.5W Detection: Motion, people, vehicle, animals, speech Classification: Vehicle color, vehicle type Recognition: Face recognition, license plate recognition ONVIF 2K: up to 2 cameras ONVIF HD: up to 3 cameras UniFi Protect: up to 5 cameras * Support for multiple cameras is planned in a future firmware update Device Wall/pipe mount (2) Zip ties (2) Screws and wall plugs
specsSearch: Power Power over Ethernet Yes PoE Input ports 1 PoE type PoE-Out + PoE-In PoE-Out standards 802.3af, 802.3at PoE Out ports 1
